title: Refactor @beskid/docs-ui book and platform-spec reader shell

source.subject: docs(AGENTS): update cross-cutting specifications and database migration details

body:
Refactors `@beskid/docs-ui` reader shells for book and platform-spec, updating AGENTS cross-cutting notes and migration context for shared chrome.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`377eb75`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/377eb75)
- **Subject:** docs(AGENTS): update cross-cutting specifications and database migration details
- **Completed:** 2026-05-23

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `stabilization`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-docs-reader-hardening`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **Docs reader hardening** (`v03-docs-reader-hardening`).
